---
id: business-date
title: "Get current business date"
description: "Returns the system as-of business date. Frontends should call this on app load and on focus to stay in sync across EOD rollovers."
sidebar_label: "Get current business date"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get current business date"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/system/business-date"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the system as-of business date. Frontends should call this on app load and on focus to stay in sync across EOD rollovers.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./business-date.RequestSchema.json")}
>
